name: bus-ticket-backend
description: Backend for Inter-city Bus Ticketing System

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,TRIP,SEAT,BOOKING,PAYMENT,TICKET,NOTIFY,ADMIN,ANALYTIC,CHATBOT,MCP" -c "bgBlue,bgGreen,bgYellow,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgRed,bgWhite,bgGray,bgBlack,bgBlueBright,bgGreenBright" "npm run dev --workspace=api-gateway" "npm run dev --workspace=trip-service" "npm run dev --workspace=seat-service" "npm run dev --workspace=booking-service" "npm run dev --workspace=payment-service" "npm run dev --workspace=ticket-worker" "npm run dev --workspace=notification-worker" "npm run dev --workspace=admin-service" "npm run dev --workspace=analytics-service" "npm run dev --workspace=chatbot-service" "npm run dev --workspace=mcp-server"
scripts.kill: powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 4000,4001,50051,50052,50053,50054,50055,50056 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Killed all service ports'"
